name: Tunnel of Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box Double Dutch Buttercream Frosting Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the sugar, continuing to cream the mixture until it is light and smooth.
4. Mix in the frosting mix (or substitute) and chopped walnuts by hand until combined.
5. Pour the batter into a bundt pan or 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 60-65 minutes, or until set.
7. Allow to cool for two hours, then remove from the pan.
8. Cool completely before serving.
9. The frosting will create a tunnel effect in the middle of the cake.
